title: Step 4 never creates a Note via Note.create — REQ-010 unfulfilled
description: REQ-010 EARS clause: 'create a new Note via Note.create(id, now) with an empty Body'. REQ-010 AC (lines 178-179): 'The new Note.body is empty string ... Note.frontmatter.createdAt === Note.frontmatter.updatedAt === now.' The implementation in initialize-capture.ts only allocates a NoteId, emits two events, and assembles InitialUIState — it never invokes any Note.create constructor and never produces a Note value with body and frontmatter. No test in step4-initialize-capture.test.ts or pipeline.test.ts asserts that a Note was created, that its body is empty, or that createdAt/updatedAt equal `now`. The Note Aggregate is completely absent from Step 4.
rationale: The Note creation call is part of the REQ-010 behavior contract; without it the Capture flow has no Note to bind to. Phase 2b should add the Note.create invocation (or document why it is deferred) and Phase 2a should add a test asserting Note.body === '' and createdAt === updatedAt === now.
